description: Get the exact signature, type and XML documentation of a C# symbol via Roslyn — what an IDE shows on hover. Use this to confirm an API's parameters, overloads and return type before writing a call, instead of guessing from memory; works for symbols from Unity assemblies and packages too.

file_path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the .cs file containing the symbol.

line.description: Optional 1-based line hint where the symbol appears (use the line numbers shown by read). Forgiving: if the symbol is not on this line, the nearest whole-word occurrence in the file is used and the output notes the adjustment. Omit it (or pass 0) when the symbol appears on only one line of the file; with several occurrences and no hint, the candidate lines are listed instead.

symbol.description: The identifier to query (e.g. 'GetComponent'); any usage or declaration site works.
